item.title: The best video I saw today

item.title: He delivers
item.description: Damn straight. Being a single dad, I explain that housekeeping is all our jobs. That we both chip in to do the chores that have to be done. It was like this when his mother was alive and still today. One of my proudest moments was last year he went to a friends for a sleepover/play video games/etc. The mother of the friend called me the next day and told me what a well mannered, polite boy he is and how he helped clean the table after dinner. My smile could have lit up the entire neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: A Mega-Dump of Music from the '80s Airwaves
item.description:
The Bangles - Walk Like an Egyptian A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this Mega Dump - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0GPBvTbhOo8QmXHmhtiAoN?si=013d3d1996734285
Bobby McFerrin - Don't Worry, Be Happy
Madonna - Lucky Star
Taylor Dane - Tell It To My Heart
Falco - Rock Me Amadeus
Belinda Carlisle - Heaven is a Place on Earth
Dead or Alive - You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)
The GoGos - Vacation
Harold Faltermeyer - Axel F
Sinéad O'Connor - Nothing Compares 2 U
Eurythmics - Would I Lie to You?
Toto - Africa
Joan Jett (and the Blackhearts) - I Hate Myself for Loving You
Billy Joel - Uptown Girl
Tracy Chapman - Fast Car
Beastie Boys - No Sleep Til Brooklyn
Madonna - Into the Groove
Queen - One Vision
OPUS - Live is Life
Cyndi Lauper - Girls Just Wanna Have Fun (EDIT: A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0zx1WMC0oJD2nRwSOrBU4T ) The hit songs from 30 years ago, Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4
Huey Lewis and the News - Back in Time
Eddy Grant - Electric Avenue
WHAM - Wake Me Up (Before You Go Go)
Simple Minds - Don't You (Forget About Me)
Dolly Parton and Kenny Rogers - Islands in the Stream
Billy Idol - White Wedding
Sheena Easton - The Lover in Me
Dexys Midnight Runner - Come on Eileen
Bruce Springsteen - Dancing in the Dark
Whitney Houston - So Emotional
The Clash - Rock the Casbah
Elton John - I'm Still Standing
Tina Turner - We Don't Need Another Hero
Enya - Orinoco Flow
Pink Floyd - Another Brick in the Wall (Part 2)
aha - Take on Me
Thomas Dolby - She Blinded Me With Science
Huey Lewis and the News - The Power of Love
George Michael - Faith
Toni Basil - Mickey
Madonna - Holiday
Chris Issak - Wicked Game
The Pointer Sisters - Neutron Dance
Spandau Ballet - True
Dire Straits - Money for Nothing
RUN DMC - Mary Mary
Katrina and the Waves - Walking on Sunshine
Culture Club - Karma Chameleon
Duran Duran - The Wild Boys
Michael Jackson - Bllie Jean
Debbie Harry - Call Me A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/3AjwzxqE0t0vi8D92q7q5r Wayback in 73 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 83 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 85 - https://imgur.com/gallery/lrddmXp Wayback in 88 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 93 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 95 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkckKb3 Wayback in 98 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA Wayback in 03 - https://imgur.com/gallery/pyMZXVP
The B-52s - Rock Lobster
DeBarge - Rhythm of the Night
Glenn Frey - The Heat is On
Robert Palmer - Simply Irresistible
Poison - Every Rose Has Its Thorn
Duran Duran - A View to a Kill
Prince - Raspberry Beret
Elton John - Candle in the Wind
Cyndi Lauper - Good Enough (The Goonies)
Céline Dion - Where Does My Heart Beat Now?
Madonna - Like a Virgin
Weird Al Yankovic - Like a Surgeon
Cher - I Found Someone
Kylie Minogue - Locomotion A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0aUVNGPFAuKN2MiEyHTR2K Wayback in 1973 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 1983 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 1998 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
Sheena Easton - Telefone
Mike Oldfield and Maggie Reilly - Moonlight Shadow
Chaka Khan - Ain't Nobody
Rose Laurens - Africa
Bell Biv DeVoe - Poison
Guns N' Roses - Sweet Child O' Mine
RUN DMC - Run's House
Dio - Rainbow in the Dark
David Bowie - Let's Dance
Sandra - Maria Magdalena
The Beach Boys - Kokomo
Stetsasonic - Talkin' All That Jazz
Pat Benatar - We Belong
NWA - Fuck Tha Police I can't imagine why this particular song never recieved an official music video like the others on the album
Paula Abdul - Opposites Attract
Quiet Riot - Cum on Feel the Noize
Technotronic - Pump Up the Jam
Olivia Newton John - Twist of Fate
REO Speedwagon - Can't Fight This Feeling
Madonna - Crazy for You
Huey Lewis & The News - Perfect World
Duran Duran - Hungry Like the Wolf
Weird Al Yankovic - Dare to Be Stupid
Pat Benatar - All Fired Up
Corey Hart - Never Surrender
George Michael - Careless Whisper
Michael Sembello - Maniac
Daryl Hall & John Oates - Out Of Touch
Cyndi Lauper - All Through the Night
Foreigner - I Want to Know What Love Is
Jon Bon Jovi - Blaze Of Glory
Weird Al Yankovic - Money for Nothing (Beverly Hills)
Ofra Haza - Im Nin'Alu

Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up
Starship - We Built this City
Sting and the Police - Every Breath You Take

Michael Jackson - Beat It

Faith No More - Epic
Hall and Oates - Maneater
Pat Benatar - Love is a Battlefield
a-Ha - Stay On These Roads

Debbie Gibson - Out of the Blue
Sananda Maitreya - Sign Your Name
Pet Shop Boys - Heart
Slick Rick - Children's Story
Phil Collins - A Groovy Kind of Love
Anthrax, Public Enemy - Bring Tha Noize

item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: She's done
item.description:
Finished up painting this 3D printed mask. Just going to hit it with some shadows from the airbrush. Had fun painting this one and it feels good to see a final product.
Loving the gold File designer by Pipe Cox Printed on an FLSun V400
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Leaded gas and Freon lol
item.description: This guy here first added lead to gasoline, then came up with the idea for Freon which destroyed the ozone. Source: https://amp.cnn.com/cnn/2024/05/24/world/thomas-midgley-jr-leaded-gas-freon-scn

item.title: Goth 2B Cosplay Transformation tutorial - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : Cosplayer : https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Artist : https://www.instagram.com/yoracrab Thank you for your support on my Goth 2B post yesterday, here's a transformation video tutorial for those interested in the steps to get into Cosplay!! Let me know if you have any other questions! Have a great day all :D -Yuzu Music : BMTH - limousine
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: When you think you finally have a date.
item.description: Woman in my massage therapy class asked me out, talked for a few weeks while she was planning a date (her idea), and she admitted today that she doesn’t want to do it anymore because I have a collection of stuffed animals that are on a shelf in my bedroom. I was feeling quite excited since I basically never get matches on dating sites, so I’m feeling pretty bummed out and a bit like a loser. Still have to see her class every week for 5 more months too. F. FP EDIT: wow, didn't expect this to get that much attention. For the record I'm not looking for people to roast this person, I like her a person and we're going to interact for the foreseeable future. I'm just trying to figure out why this whole situation is making me feel like shit. 2nd edit: been asked a few times so here is the collection: https://imgur.com/gallery/y7MtRLO TLDR: Not mad at lady, why do I feel like shit?
item.dc:creator: saeheria

item.title: Uncle Clarence Strikes Again
item.description: https://x.com/axios/status/1793737110479921622 Is opinion was given in a case concerning racial gerrymandering in voter districts in South Carolina. They voted 6-3 to allow the local GQP keep their racial gerrymandering. And not only did the 6 scumbags decide that racial gerrymandering is ok if done purely for partisan reasons, Clarence stepped up to say that states should be allowed to racially segregate in education if they wanted to. All this comes as it’s reviled that his partner in slime Sam Alito has been flying insurrectionist flags outside his homes in sympathy of Trump and the Jan 6 mob, during cases concerning them that he refused to recluse himself from. And not forgetting also that Clarence’s wife was also in on that insurrection. This can’t go on any more. Something’s got to give. Also be prepared for a load of right wing deflection, gaslighting and gloating about this.
item.dc:creator: Thelrishlnquistion

item.title: Meet the Greek Kittens!!
item.description:
My pet sitter Jamie, who took care of the Coffee Kittens five out of the ten weeks I had them, asked if she could name my new foster kittens. Of course I had to say yes!! And she chose some AWESOME names. Meet the Greek Kittens!! Delphi is one of two girl kittens, and very demure so far. Ok with being held but doesn’t seek me out.
Odie clams up when I pick him up, but is very adventurous on the ground. He was one of the first ones to venture out of the carrier.
Helios is already a force to be reckoned with. He loves to be in my lap and isn’t afraid to push aside a brother or sister for some pets.
Persephone is a quiet kitten but also more forceful than her sister. She wasn’t afraid to climb my legs to get closer to me. She gets that I am here to help. I love that.
OMG Nyx. He’s a sleeper kitten. He was super comfortable being held but also doesn’t spend too much time with me. He’s busy checking out the room. He’s the one that makes me say “I’m gonna make you love me!!”
Poor mama Calliope is terrified. I’m letting her sleep on one of the shelves tonight and not bothering her. I’m very much hoping that she gets over her fear and comes down to nurse her babies, but I’m not confident that is going to happen. Luckily it seems like most of the babies are starting to eat the dry food. And they’re using the litter box!! A few of the kittens have some eye goop, and they are COVERED in fleas, but other than that, this is a super healthy litter! I’m gonna let the flea meds and eye meds work overnight, and tomorrow is gonna be a bright new day full of hope and happiness for this family!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: 6 weeks.
item.description: I won't lie, I've been wanting on and off a cold beer the last couple of days, but my health is improving too much for me to want one anyway.
item.dc:creator: fiddlewheelx
